name: Spinach Balls with Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry (10 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
MUSTARD SAUCE:
1. Combine mustard and vinegar in a small bowl.
2. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 4 hours.
3. Mix sugar and egg yolk in a small saucepan; add mustard and vinegar mixture and cook over low heat, stirring constantly until slightly thickened. Cover and chill.
Combine all ingredients (except sauce) in a large bowl and mix well. Shape into 1-inch balls. Cover and refrigerate or freeze until ready to bake.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Set balls on an ungreased baking sheet and bake until golden brown, about 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Serve with Mustard Sauce.
Makes 70 appetizers.
